page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.m1.medium is a general-purpose virtual machine instance belonging to the ecs.m1 server family. Built on the x86_64 CPU architecture, this instance is configured with 4 dedicated virtual CPUs mapped directly to 4 physical cores, operating with a single thread per core. It features 16.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance runs on the KVM hypervisor.

This instance does not include bundled local storage or integrated GPU hardware, requiring external network-attached storage for operating system and application data. The underlying CPU architecture lacks support for advanced instruction sets such as Advanced Vector Extensions (AVX, AVX512), Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX), and hardware-accelerated cryptography (AES, SHA_NI). Additionally, hyper-threading is disabled, meaning each of the 4 vCPUs corresponds to a dedicated physical core.

Given the balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the ecs.m1.medium is designed for general-purpose workloads. It is suitable for hosting standard web servers, application servers, development environments, and lightweight databases that do not require high-performance vector processing or hardware-accelerated encryption. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation provides predictable compute performance for baseline workloads, though the absence of modern instruction sets and local storage limits its utility for intensive analytical or cryptographic tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.m1.medium is an x86_64 general-purpose virtual machine instance from the ecs.m1 family. It features 4 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 4 physical cores with a single thread per core, providing predictable compute performance. The instance is equipped with 16.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. Running on the KVM hypervisor, it does not include bundled local storage or GPU accelerators, necessitating network-attached storage for data persistence. The CPU lacks advanced instruction sets such as AVX, AVX512, and hardware-accelerated cryptography. This instance is suited for standard web serving, application hosting, and development environments that require stable, dedicated CPU resources without the need for specialized vector processing or high-performance local disk I/O.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.m1.medium is a general-purpose x86_64 virtual machine featuring 4 dedicated vCPUs, 16 GB of RAM, and KVM virtualization. It is designed for standard web serving and application hosting without local storage.

tagline: A dedicated four-core general-purpose instance with balanced memory allocation for standard web serving and application hosting workloads.

16.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core
KVM hypervisor-based virtualization with dedicated CPU allocation
